channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: ESPN broadcaster reveals why he was brought to tears on broadcast after Ohio State won national championship
item.description: Kirk Herbstreit addressed his tears that were seen on the ESPN broadcast after Ohio State won the national title, when he revealed his wife, Ally, was diagnosed with breast cancer.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Australian Open: American player Ben Shelton criticizes TV interviewers at tournament
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — American tennis player Ben Shelton criticized on Wednesday some of the questions and comments made by post-match TV interviewers at the Australian Open.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Patriots safety Jabrill Peppers goes on trial over allegations of domestic violence
item.description: QUINCY, Mass. (AP) — Patriots safety Jabrill Peppers is scheduled to go on trial Wednesday for allegedly shoving his girlfriend's head into a wall and repeatedly choking her after she received a phone call while they were in bed together.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL CASEY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Ichiro Suzuki, CC Sabathia and Billy Wagner elected to Baseball Hall of Fame
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Used to leading off, Ichiro Suzuki got antsy when he had to wait. Considered a no-doubt pick for baseball's Hall of Fame and possibly the second unanimous selection, he waited by the phone for the expected call Tuesday. Fifteen minutes passed without a ring.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: High school basketball player jumps into action to save opponent's life after harrowing on-court collapse
item.description: A high school basketball player in Oklahoma was transported to a hospital after collapsing during the opening moments of a game earlier this month.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jazz trade draft picks to Phoenix Suns
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Jazz have so many first round draft picks over the next few years, they traded three of them to get one future first-rounder.
item.dc:creator: ABC 4

item.title: Vikings and coach Kevin O'Connell agree to a multiyear contract extension after a 14-win season
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — The Minnesota Vikings and coach Kevin O'Connell agreed to terms on a multiyear contract extension on Tuesday, following a 14-3 regular season that defied external widespread preseason projections of at least a losing record if not a last-place finish in the NFC North.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Liverpool beats Lille to reach Champions League round of 16. Barcelona wins 9-goal thriller
item.description: Liverpool became the first team to guarantee a place in the last 16 of the new Champions League format by beating Lille 2-1 on Tuesday, while Barcelona fought back from two goals down to stun Benfica 5-4 in a thriller.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ELLINGWORTH, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: SafeSport Center adds morals clause, strengthens vetting after ex-investigator's arrests
item.description: The U.S. Center for SafeSport will add a morals clause to its code of conduct, and the CEO will start interviewing job candidates herself in the wake of the arrest of a former investigator who was charged with rape and other sex crimes.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Brett Favre opens up about challenge of facing Trump in golf
item.description: Former NFL quarterback Brett Favre spoke about his experience playing with Trump in a post on Monday, saying, "Trump is REALLY GOOD and a competitor.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rondé Barber helps build Habitat for Humanity home
item.description: ST. PETERSBURGH, Fla. (WFLA) - Community leaders got together Tuesday to build a home for a family in St. Petersburg. This will serve as the first official build day for Habitat for Humanity Tampa Bay Gulfside's fourth annual CEO Build.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC

item.title: College Football Playoff lessons: Format tweaks needed, but expansion worked as designed
item.description: The 12-team format needs tweaks but succeeding in its primary mission of creating more access on multiple levels.
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: Australian Open: Novak Djokovic beats Carlos Alcaraz and gets closer to a 25th Grand Slam title
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Novak Djokovic refused to let anything stop his pursuit of a record 25th Grand Slam trophy in the Australian Open quarterfinals. Not a problem with his left leg. Not an early deficit.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ohio State wins 1st national title since 2014, outlasting Notre Dame 34-23 in CFP championship game
item.description: Instead of crying over another collapse, Ohio State can celebrate another national title after holding off a Notre Dame comeback bid Monday night to walk away with a nailbiter of a 34-23 victory over the Fighting Irish.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Late Ohio State field goal is a win for Buckeyes bettors in CFP title game victory over Notre Dame
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Jayden Fielding's 33-yard field goal with 26 seconds remaining did more than secure Ohio State's 34-23 victory over Notre Dame in the College Football Playoff title game on Monday night. It also handed Ohio State bettors the victory.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Report: Bears hiring Lions OC Ben Johnson as next head coach
item.description: The Chicago Bears are reportedly finalizing a deal to hire Detroit Lions offensive coordinator Ben Johnson as their new head coach.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Powell and the Clippers beat James and the Lakers 116-102 in Lakers' first visit to Intuit Dome
item.description: Norman Powell scored 22 points, James Harden added 21 points and 12 assists and the Los Angeles Clippers defeated LeBron James and the Los Angeles Lakers 116-102 on Sunday night in the Lakers' first visit to the new Intuit Dome.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Australian Open 2025: How to watch on TV, betting odds and more to know
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Get caught up on the Australian Open with a guide that tells you everything you need to know about how to watch the year’s first Grand Slam tennis tournament, what the betting odds are, what the schedule is and more: How to watch the Australian Open on TV — In the
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utah Valley wins on overtime buzzer-beater, 85-83
item.description: ARLINGTON, Tex. (ABC4 Sports) - Texas native Kylin Green went the full length of the floor in five seconds and dished to Jackson Holcombe, who scored in the final second of overtime to lift Utah Valley to a thrilling 85-83 road victory over UT Arlington on Thursday night at College Park Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Montrose boys basketball escapes a scare from Central as Red Hawk girls dominate Warriors
item.description: For the first time this season the high-flying Red Hawks of Montrose made the trip to the Grand Valley.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Boys Basketball: Rancho Buena Vista 63, La Costa Canyon 61
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI- Fantastic hoops game on Wednesday night with Rancho Buena Vista edging La Costa Canyon 63-61.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: How to watch Stanford vs. UNC basketball in the Bay Area
item.description: (KRON) -- The Stanford Cardinal men's basketball team will face North Carolina in a cross-country ACC battle on Saturday. The game is being shown exclusively on KRON4. Stanford (11-6, 3-3 ACC) and UNC (12-6, 5-1 ACC) tip off at 11:15 a.m. PT. You can watch on KRON4 on stream on the CW app.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Utah Royals have busy offseason with massive roster overhaul
item.description: The Utah Royals have had a busy offseason. There have been departures and additions galore, as the team continues to try to improve before the 2025 NWSL season with the goal of making playoffs for the first time.
item.dc:creator: Stockton Mair, ABC 4

item.title: Big Will's Divisional Round NFL Picks
item.description: In this week's edition of NFL Picks, Big Will gives his picks for all four Divisional Round playoff games this weekend.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: White Sox announce 16 signings in 2025 international class
item.description: The Chicago White Sox have agreed to terms with 16 international players, including two ranked in the Top 100 available prospects, Alejandro Cruz and Orlando Patiño, and other prospects with potential.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
